bio.es: Co-autor del legendario libro 'The C Programming Language' junto a Dennis Ritchie, conocido simplemente como 'K&R'. Contribuyó al desarrollo de Unix y creó herramientas fundamentales como AWK. Su estilo de escritura claro y sus aforismos sobre programación han educado a generaciones enteras de desarrolladores.
bio.en: Co-author of the legendary 'The C Programming Language' book with Dennis Ritchie, known simply as 'K&R'. He contributed to Unix development and created fundamental tools like AWK. His clear writing style and programming aphorisms have educated entire generations of developers.
